prompt: A cinematic studio photograph of an open pop-up book on a clean white surface, viewed from a low front angle, with a dramatic T-rex made entirely of intricate white origami and laser-cut paper bursting upward from the center fold. The dinosaur is large and dominant, facing right in a roaring pose with open jaws, sharp paper teeth, tiny forearms, powerful legs, and a long tail sweeping left. Its body is built from hundreds of delicate layered paper slats and cutout perforations, glowing from strong internal and under-page illumination so the creature appears backlit and semi-luminous. Around the base, exactly 7 paper plant silhouettes rise from the pages: 3 darker branching shrubs in the foreground and 4 pale fern-like foliage shapes behind them, all also cut from paper. The open pages show faint printed text on the right-hand spread, while the center gutter emits a bright white light that shines upward through the structure. A soft cool-blue ambient environment contrasts with the warm white glow from inside the book, creating a magical children's advertisement feel. Strong spotlighting from above and behind the dinosaur produces crisp shadows cast across the next spread and onto the tabletop. Minimal background, high detail, elegant product-ad aesthetic, volumetric haze, shallow depth of field, monochrome white and blue palette, ultra-clean composition, surreal handcrafted realism.
